message.content:
@startuml
title Mengubah SubMenu

actor Administrator
participant Dashboard_V
participant Submenu_V
participant EditSubmenu_V
participant Admin_C
participant Menu_C
participant Submenu_E

note right of Administrator
Inputan Submenu
@endnote

1 load->view()
2 Halaman Dashboard
3 klik menu Submenu management
4 Submenu()
5
6
7 load->view()
8 Halaman Submenu management
9 klik tombol EditSubmenu
10 EditSubmenu()
11 load->view()
12 Halaman EditSubmenu
13 Mengisi Inputan dan klik tombol edit
note right of Administrator
Inputan Submenu
@endnote

14 EditSubmenu()
15
alt [isValid() case]
    16 isValid()
    17 load->view()
    18 Halaman Submenu
    [isInvalid() case]
    19 isInValid()
    20 load->view()
    21 Halaman Edit Submenu
@enduml
